content.en:
Rumble!!!!!

Ye Tian showed all his strength, which made Dover directly dumbfounded.

"How is this possible......"

Dover couldn't believe that the second strongest man in the Emperor List of the Aromu Fortress was so terrifying.

This is simply the first Amusha on the emperor list, and it is even more terrifying!

His attack couldn't hurt Ye Tian at all, but Ye Tian's Luo Mu sword light plus the Ultimate Rule Realm directly broke through his defense.

While!

A scale appeared on Dover's body, resisting Ye Tian's attack.

"Kill!"

Ye Tian kept attacking, and the sword light of Aromu combined with the power of the Ultimate Rule Realm, and after hundreds of attacks, he finally shattered the scale on Dover's body.

"Damn, the scales given by the ancestors have been shattered!"

Dover's face changed drastically.

If it was in the outside world, it would be impossible for Ye Tian to smash the scales given by the ancestor, but in the Huoxi space-time battlefield, such an ultimate ancient demon thing is also a kind of suppression, and the defensive effect is naturally not so powerful, so it will be shattered by Ye Tian.

There was another reason, and that was that he couldn't exert the power of this scale, otherwise the scale would not have shattered.

Immediately afterwards, a variety of precious treasures appeared on Dover's body, 297 but under Ye Tian's attack, they all turned into fragments.

And the treasures that are generally used to escape are also difficult to have an effect under the suppression of the Ultimate Rule Realm.

He tried to escape several times, but was sabotaged by the Ultimate Rule Realm.

"God, spare your life, I will give you all the treasures on my body!"

Dover begged for mercy.

He doesn't want to fall, with his potential, he will definitely become a peak ancient demon-level powerhouse in the future, and there is even a little hope of breaking through to the ultimate ancient demon!

But now, he is going to fall here, he is unwilling!

Knowing this, he would not stop at the emperor level, but break through to the ancient demon level realm.

At this moment, he is extremely remorseful!

However.

Ye Tian naturally wouldn't let Doover go, after all, he had completely offended Dover, so he naturally had to kill him, otherwise let Dover escape alive, with Dover's temperament, he was afraid that he would retaliate against him.

When the time comes, he may have more enemies at the peak Ancient Demon level or even an enemy at the ultimate Ancient Demon level.

So, Dover must die!

In the Ancient Demon Realm of Time and Space, the outside world does not know about killing a strong emperor like Dover, and even the emperor list cannot spy on the battle situation here.

Burst!

Dover's defenses were all destroyed, and the light of Aromu's sword pierced through Dover's imperial body.

Then, Aromu's sword light diverged into billions and shattered the countless ultimate particles in his body.

Gradually, the ultimate particles in Dover's body were cut off, and finally turned into an ordinary corpse.

After killing Dover, Ye Tian took away the treasures on Dover's body, but some of the treasures were of unknown origin, and he destroyed them directly, otherwise he would be tracked.

......

Outside the Ancient Demon Realm of Time and Space.

Yan Chen, the top ancient demon-level powerhouse in Yan Xi's main department, suddenly changed his face, and endless killing intent spread.

"Yanchen, what are you crazy about?"

The top Ancient Demon-level powerhouses of the other main departments asked.

Yanchen roared angrily: "Dover, who is the number one emperor in my department, has been killed!!!"

"What, Dover was killed?"

"Dover is also the first powerhouse of the very old Emperor List, older than me, when I was still at the Emperor level, he was the first on the Emperor List, and now he is still stranded at the Emperor level, just to get more resources from the Time and Space Ancient Demon Realm for the main department of Yan Xi, but I didn't expect that this time I was killed not long after entering the Time and Space Ancient Demon Realm!"

"With the strength of Dover, among the three hundred and sixty-five main divisions, there are only a handful of Emperor List powerhouses who can kill Dover, there should be only a few, right?"

"Not necessarily, maybe a certain emperor list powerhouse has made a breakthrough in strength, but he hasn't shown it!"

"Hahaha, Dover is dead, Yan Xi's main department must be distressed to death, this is a good thing! If Yan Xi is allowed to live, the future will definitely be an invincible existence among the ancient demon-level powerhouses of the peak (CFEF) peak, it's a pity!"

"The main department of Yanxi is going crazy this time, if the second person on the other emperor's list also falls, then the main department of Yanxi will have nothing to gain this time, and there will be no benefits. "

Listening to the discussions of other top Ancient Demon level powerhouses, Yan Chen was extremely annoyed, but he didn't know who the murderer was, after all, what was happening in the Time and Space Ancient Demon Realm, they couldn't snoop on, and even the ultimate Ancient Demon powerhouses couldn't deduce it.

"I hope Jave can come out alive!"

Yanchen said darkly.

Yafu is the second on the list of emperors in the main department of Yanxi, and his strength is much weaker than Dover, but as long as he is lucky, he can come out alive.

......

Inside the Ancient Demon Realm of Time and Space.

Ye Tian searched for resources everywhere, and after finding some resources, he sent them back to the hands of another replica body, and then continued to look for resources.

During this period, he also met other Emperor List powerhouses in the main department, and unless other Emperor List powerhouses took the initiative to attack and kill him, he would not take the initiative to attack.

It's not that he's merciful, it's that he has killed too many Emperor List powerhouses, and it's hard to explain when the time comes, in case the ultimate ancient demons have the means to investigate, so they join forces to ask for exploration, then the risk of him being exposed is very great.

With the strength of the ultimate ancient demons, it is not difficult to find out all of his copied bodies in the territory of the main body of the mother of Aluo.

In case the main department of Arrow Mother can't withstand the threat of the other main departments and hands him over, then he can leave this era and return to his own era.

In that case, it would be a pity.

He also wanted to break through to the ultimate ancient demon realm in this era, so that he could obtain countless inheritances, which would be of great help to him in the future.

At that time, he would also be able to break through to the Ultimate Ancient Demon Realm in his own time.

Deep in the Ancient Demon Realm of Time and Space.

Ye Tian sensed a number of Emperor List powerhouses, among whom Amusha was also here, and they were all here to comprehend a special time-space picture.

Rumble!!!

A terrifying creature tears through the void and fights another creature to kill it, and that's where the image plays out.

"It's the picture recorded by the Ancient Demon Pillar of Time and Space, and it's reflected here. "

Ye Tianming enlightened.

And these two creatures probably have the strength of the ultimate ancient demon, and because the picture is reflected, it shows the mystery of the ultimate ancient demon, which can make people understand.

That's why these emperor powerhouses will stay here to comprehend.

For them, contemplating this image is as valuable as finding something precious.

Ye Tian also stayed here, anyway, he has other replica bodies, he can continue to explore, this replica body is here to comprehend this picture, maybe there is a great gain!.
